# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "appName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Web App name (must be globally unique)."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('appName'), '-plan')]"
    },
    "appServiceSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S1",
      "allowedValues": [
        "F1",
        "D1",
        "B1",
        "B2",
        "B3",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "S3",
        "P1v3",
        "P2v3",
        "P3v3"
      ]
    },
    "appServiceSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Free",
        "Shared",
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "PremiumV3"
      ]
    },
    "dotnetVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "v8.0",
      "allowedValues": [
        "v6.0",
        "v7.0",
        "v8.0"
      ]
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Storage account name (3-24 lowercase letters and numbers)."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SQL logical server name (must be globally unique)."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "S2",
        "P1",
        "P2",
        "P4"
      ]
    },
    "sqlDatabaseMaxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2147483648"
    },
    "allowAzureServicesToAccessSql": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageApiVersion": "2023-01-01",
    "webApiVersion": "2022-09-01",
    "sqlApiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
    "appInsightsNotIncluded": true,
    "sqlConnectionStringName": "DefaultConnection",
    "sqlServerFqdn": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net')]",
    "sqlConnectionString": "[concat('Server=tcp:', variables('sqlServerFqdn'), ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]",
    "storageConnectionString": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageApiVersion')).keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[if(parameters('allowAzureServicesToAccessSql'), '0.0.0.0', '255.255.255.255')]",
        "endIpAddress": "[if(parameters('allowAzureServicesToAccessSql'), '0.0.0.0', '255.255.255.255')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('sqlApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSkuName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseMaxSizeBytes')]",
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('webApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('appServiceSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('appServiceSkuTier')]",
        "capacity": 1
      },
      "properties": {
        "reserved": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('webApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "netFrameworkVersion": "[parameters('dotnetVersion')]",
          "alwaysOn": "[not(equals(parameters('appServiceSkuTier'), 'Free'))]",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "1"
            },
            {
              "name": "Storage__ConnectionString",
              "value": "[variables('storageConnectionString')]"
            }
          ],
          "connectionStrings": [
            {
              "name": "[variables('sqlConnectionStringName')]",
              "connectionString": "[variables('sqlConnectionString')]",
              "type": "SQLAzure"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "webAppUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat('https://', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('webApiVersion')).defaultHostName)]"
    },
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('sqlServerFqdn')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    }
  }
}
